title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: iscsi-initiator-utils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for iscsi-initiator-utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The iscsi-initiator-utils packages provide the server daemon for the Internet Small Computer System Interface (iSCSI) protocol, as well as the utility programs used to manage it. The iSCSI protocol is a protocol for distributed disk access using SCSI commands sent over Internet Protocol (IP) networks.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [NetApp RHEL 8.10 Bug]: iSCSI paths fail to get reinstated after ONTAP failover operations (JIRA:RHEL-82415)
affected_products: Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems

Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for iscsi-initiator-utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The iscsi-initiator-utils packages provide the server daemon for the Internet Small Computer System Interface (iSCSI) protocol, as well as the utility programs used to manage it. The iSCSI protocol is a protocol for distributed disk access using SCSI commands sent over Internet Protocol (IP) networks.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [NetApp RHEL 8.10 Bug]: iSCSI paths fail to get reinstated after ONTAP failover operations (JIRA:RHEL-82415)
